name: Seasame Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach thoroughly and trim off tough stems. Spin or pat dry.
2. Mix remaining ingredients together and toss with spinach.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE CAL: 71; CHO: Omg; CAR: 5g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 217mg; FAT: 5g.
